task_completion.description: Create a new Autopsy case named 'Cloud_Return_2024' with case number 'INV-CLD-001'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy 'New Case Information' dialog or the main Autopsy window title bar showing the case name 'Cloud_Return_2024' and case number 'INV-CLD-001'.

task_completion.description: Add logical files from the specified evidence directory as a data source.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy 'Add Data Source' dialog showing 'Logical Files' selected with the path '/home/ga/evidence/Cloud_Return/', or the Autopsy tree view displaying 'Cloud_Return' as a logical file set.

task_completion.description: Configure ingest modules to run ONLY 'Hash Lookup' and 'File Type Identification'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy 'Configure Ingest Modules' window showing checkboxes selected ONLY for 'Hash Lookup' and 'File Type Identification', with all other modules unchecked.

task_completion.description: Generate a tab-delimited catalog file at /home/ga/Reports/logical_catalog.tsv with the required header.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal, text editor, or spreadsheet application showing the contents of '/home/ga/Reports/logical_catalog.tsv' starting with the header 'FILENAME\tPATH\tSIZE\tMD5\tMIME_TYPE' followed by rows of file data.

task_completion.description: Write a summary file at /home/ga/Reports/cloud_summary.txt with the required counts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal or text editor showing the contents of '/home/ga/Reports/cloud_summary.txt' containing the exact lines 'TOTAL_FILES: <N>', 'JPEG_IMAGES: <N>', and 'TEXT_FILES: <N>'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Autopsy GUI to process the evidence rather than bypassing the tool with command-line utilities.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Autopsy application open, navigating through the 'New Case' and 'Add Data Source' wizards, and displaying the processed results in the UI.

integrity.description: The agent extracted the catalog and summary data from Autopsy rather than hallucinating the contents.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent viewing the file list, MIME types, and MD5 hashes within Autopsy, or using Autopsy's 'Generate Report' / 'Export' features before creating the final TSV and TXT files.

integrity.description: The agent used the exact paths requested in the prompt without creating arbitrary directories.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal commands or file editor paths explicitly showing '/home/ga/Reports/logical_catalog.tsv' and '/home/ga/Reports/cloud_summary.txt'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Case Name must be 'Cloud_Return_2024'. Case Number must be 'INV-CLD-001'. Evidence Directory is '/home/ga/evidence/Cloud_Return'. Catalog File must be saved to '/home/ga/Reports/logical_catalog.tsv' and include the header FILENAME, PATH, SIZE, MD5, MIME_TYPE. Summary File must be saved to '/home/ga/Reports/cloud_summary.txt' and formatted exactly with TOTAL_FILES: <N>, JPEG_IMAGES: <N>, TEXT_FILES: <N>.
